subject: Ernesto’s Somerville
description:
Our “10” gluten free pizza”  is not on our catering menu for Somerville. It should be listed right after large cheese. The topping selections are pepperoni, sausage, onion, mushroom, peppers, broccoli, olives. 

Base price for a cheese is $11.75, 
Toppings (only available on the whole pizza) 
are $3.95 each
